meaning: n.Frances 的爱称,女子救护队队员 <美俚> 屁股 <英俚>女性生殖器
examples: Abe's elder sister, Fanny, is studying history.
To get a slim figure, Fanny has tried many ways, but in vain. So now she is reduced to not eating anything for supper.
This lightweight zoom camera will fit comfortably into a fanny pack or coat pocket.
Fanny Mann sang, finally lighting her cigarette, mindful of the flame so near her bandages.
When Fanny Mann returned, her chest was bound, her lips swollen, and her eyes hidden behind sunglasses.
